abstract.t:
Segment Routing over IPv6 (SRv6) is the instantiation of Segment Routing (SR) on the IPv6 dataplane. Segments are indicated by Segment Identifiers (SIDs). SRv6 utilizes the Segment Routing Header (SRH), an IPv6 extension header, that includes a SID list indicating the sequence of segments and any additional processing to be performed.
This document clarifies the processing of SID list entries. It does not change any elements of the SRv6 architecture and makes no technical changes to the mechanisms or procedures of SRv6.
